text:
The Sniper experimented with ways on how to create a device that allows his head to vibrate in a way to avoid other snipers headshotting him, while still staying attached.
In doing so, however, he accidentally found a way to phase his head out of the dimensions that we are familiar with. While this gave a sense of euphoria (hence the laughing), it also stripped him of his sanity, as would anyone who found their brain inside an unfamiliar dimension.

text: As I progressed steadily through watching this video, my pupils appeared to dilate and expand in such a fashion that I truly began to realise what I was seeing. It was a horror... a nightmare... and it was invading my mind. I could feel my sanity leave me as I brought my hands up to my head, clinging to the last dregs of my mind. The overpowering imagery from such video was so strong, however, that my mere hands were no match for the video, and the rest of my skull emptied.

text:
It slowly dawned on the Spy just what kind of situation he was in. The Sniper had done something that normal humans should never do. The was Spy was left in a twisted panic, only able to let out a single sentence before it happened.  
"Okay, mate..." 
Spy and the reality around him was reduced to nothing as everything returned to one point of origin within the Sniper's very being. The world had ended, there was nothing but a single lone Sniper left in the remains.
